checks.name: google:calendar
checks.detail:
No auth for calendar jcubellagent@gmail.com.

OAuth (browser flow):
  gog auth add jcubellagent@gmail.com --services calendar

Workspace service account (domain-wide delegation):
  gog auth service-account set jcubellagent@gmail.com --key <service-account.json>

checks.name: google:gmail
checks.detail:
No auth for gmail jcubellagent@gmail.com.

OAuth (browser flow):

Workspace service account (domain-wide delegation):
  gog auth service-account set jcubellagent@gmail.com --key <service-account.json>
